title: Xtra Tender German Broad Beans Wrap
description: A tender and flavorful German dish featuring broad beans, perfect for a date night, wrapped in leaves and steamed to perfection, dairy-free friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and blanch the collard green leaves for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Shock the leaves in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the broad beans to the skillet and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Season the broad beans with salt, black pepper, and lemon juice.
To assemble the wraps, lay a collard green leaf flat and place about 1/2 cup of the broad bean mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining leaves and filling.
Steam the wraps over boiling water for 5 minutes, covered with a lid.
